description: This pipeline processes images by first extracting their properties and annotating them, then splitting the image into specific parts based on selected dimensions. The split images are further processed using an extended depth of focus projection to maximize intensity, resulting in a projected output. Additionally, the annotated image is also passed through a compartment for further processing or output. Overall, the pipeline aims to enhance and extract relevant information from the input images through a series of processing steps.

c6fe2bad-a88e-4872-862d-c0cae03c72fc.name: ij1-dimensions-hyper-stacksplitter
c6fe2bad-a88e-4872-862d-c0cae03c72fc.description: Splits a hyperstack by a selected dimension into a single or multiple output slots. Multiple output slots can be utilized to split specific indices.

47c49164-bed6-4aef-87b5-36f5473a4b21.name: image-properties-to-annotation
47c49164-bed6-4aef-87b5-36f5473a4b21.description: Adds data annotations that contain the image properties.

af87d5d2-d827-405a-80ea-ea16b61be5f7.name: clij:plugin:net.haesleinhuepf.clij2.plugins.ExtendedDepthOfFocusSobelProjection
af87d5d2-d827-405a-80ea-ea16b61be5f7.description:
Extended depth of focus projection maximizing intensity in the local sobel image.

The sigma parameter allows controlling an Gaussian blur which should smooth the altitude map.

Parameters: Image source, ByRef Image destination, Number sigma
Available for: 3D -> 2D
